transcript.text:
I'm here to do a Challenge Mukbang
[Finish 5 servings of TanTan Ramen in 20 minutes]
[Let's see the visuals...]
[HUGE]
[The size is quite shocking...]
[The die has been cast...]
It's creeping up
Spicy!
[One who wears the crown, bears the crown]
54 seconds
[Will she be able to defeat this challenge?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Yongsan today
I'll be doing a Challenge Mukbang today
The Jumbo TanTan Ramen is 5 servings And I need to finish it within 20 minutes to eat for free
I've been told that it's a little spicy so I'm worried

Let's head inside
It's right behind me
[An alley located near Seoul station]
[Yuki Saki] [Seoul, Yongsan-gu]
Hello
[5 servings in 20 minutes!]
The winners are posted there
Hello
-Do you have the Jumbo TanTan Ramen? -Yes
Is it spicy?
It's spicy, but you get to choose the level of spiciness
There have been only 4 people that finished it
Not that many people then...
You can take your time to cool it down Just need to finish it in 20 mins
-If not, it's 35,000 Won -Thank you
Customer: She's so skinny, so I don't think she can do it

Or maybe go over the time limit Maybe over 30 mins
That motivates me even more
This is the widest bowl I've ever seen in a Challenge Mukbang
I don't think I can finish it
5 boiled eggs
Lots of Chashu as well (pork)
Really don't think I can do it
I can eat a lot by taking my time, but I'm not a fast eater
This looks delicious though
[Cooling it down]
I won't rush it too much So that I can taste the flavors
Can't taste anything if I eat too fast
Bon appetit!
Fighting!
Thank you!
Bon appetit

Some soup first! I wanna try it
Tasty!
Delicious!
The noodles are cooked so well
It definitely has a kick to the seasoning
Boiled egg! I've been wanting to eat this
The yolk falls out like this
Half-boiled
It's all over my clothes
Nutty and delicious
It's spicy
I haven't done a Challenge Mukbang in a while
I haven't had the Chashu yet
It's very soft
Jelly-like
That's really good

What's the time?
4 mins passed already?
I can eat a lot by taking my time
Not too good at eating fast
It's starting to creep up
Spicy!
My tongue
That's really spicy
[6 minutes have elapsed...]
1 serving of it isn't spicy
[But this is 5 servings!]
It's spicy
[But it's so good, I can't stop]
It's really spicy
Well, not that much
But my tongue hurts

Time? 10 mins?
I don't have much time left
I'm finished with the noodles
A piece of Chashu
Tasty!
[9 minutes left!]
Chashu!
It's not Chashu It's an egg
There it is
The meat helps neutralize the spiciness
What's the time?
7 minutes
How will she finish the soup? By drinking it as a whole?
Like this?
That's so heavy
[Almost like drinking out of a sink]

Is there a method?
Is this right?
Should I help her?
[I can do it...]
It's spicy!
[14 minutes have elapsed]
[I can do it!]
Lovely
But I'm in tears
It's a very refreshing type of spiciness
-What's the time? -5 mins left
5 mins already?!
[There's really not much left...]
[Will she be able to do it?]
It's spicy!
[4 mins left]

[Finished the soup]
She finished it Wow
[Where did all the soup go?]
I think she can do it now
Seems possible
The egg is delicious
How many minutes?
PD: 54 seconds
[I must eat faster]
Just kidding It's 2 mins
[Angry Tzu]
[With 1 minute left]
Finished
[Successfully finished the challenge with 46 seconds left]
Thank you
Finishing it just in time is the way to go

[The food is free]
I feel bad now
I should get some orders to-go
[Ordering some food to take home]
[Congratulations]
I had a great meal today
I will be eating the to-go orders at home for dessert
Thanks everyone
[Became a 5th winner on the hall of fame!] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
